title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入格林纳达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入格瑞那達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Grenada Bureau of Standards (GDBS) conformity requirements, Public Utilities Regulatory Commission (PURC) regulatory framework, GRENLEC grid-connection requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation expectations, UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport requirements, and the 230/400 V 50 Hz Caribbean grid context — versus China GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 baselines. Special considerations include hurricane wind-load and salt-mist derating for the Eastern Caribbean environment and sea-freight logistics via St George's Harbour.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与格林纳达标准局（GDBS）合格评定要求、公用事业监管委员会（PURC）监管框架、GRENLEC并网要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输要求及加勒比海230/400 V 50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基准的差距对照。特别注意事项包括东加勒比海环境下的飓风风荷载及盐雾降额，以及经圣乔治港的海运物流。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與格瑞那達標準局（GDBS）合格評定要求、公用事業監管委員會（PURC）監管框架、GRENLEC併網要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸要求及加勒比海230/400 V 50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基準的差距對照。特別注意事項包括東加勒比海環境下的颶風風荷載及鹽霧降額，以及經聖喬治港的海運物流。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, GDBS conformity scope determination, PURC regulatory approval, GRENLEC grid-connection approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Grenada GDBS standards, PURC regulatory requirements, GRENLEC technical interconnection specifications, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation. GDBS and PURC institutional capacity is still developing; direct engagement is essential as published documentation may be limited.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、GDBS合格评定范围裁定、PURC监管批准、GRENLEC并网批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行格林纳达GDBS标准、PURC监管要求、GRENLEC并网技术规格、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。GDBS和PURC机构能力仍在建设中；直接接触至关重要，因公开文件可能有限。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、GDBS合格評定範圍裁定、PURC監管批准、GRENLEC併網批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行格瑞那達GDBS標準、PURC監管要求、GRENLEC併網技術規格、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。GDBS和PURC機構能力仍在建設中；直接接觸至關重要，因公開文件可能有限。

answer_first.en: Grenada does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to established SABER/IEC 62619 routes or the EU Battery Regulation. BESS projects in Grenada operate under IEC/UK-legacy standards and GRENLEC interconnection requirements, with PURC serving as the energy regulator and GDBS as the standards body. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Grenada are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline for project acceptance — Chinese GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, and GB 38031 are not accepted as substitutes; (2) IEC 62933 system-level technical requirements where referenced in GRENLEC or project-owner specifications; (3) NFPA 855-aligned fire-safety installation design, as Grenada follows a NFPA-informed code framework; (4) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory under international transport conventions for sea-freight via St George's; (5) 230/400 V grid configuration — note that although China and Grenada both use 50 Hz, the voltage differs (China is 220/380 V) and PCS must be re-parameterised; and (6) hurricane wind-load (Category 4–5 design basis post-Ivan 2004) and salt-mist IEC 60068-2-52 corrosion derating required for Caribbean deployment. GDBS institutional capacity is still developing, and PURC does not yet publish detailed BESS-specific technical interconnection standards publicly — direct engagement with GRENLEC and PURC is essential before project equipment is finalised.
answer_first.zh: 格林纳达尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与成熟的SABER/IEC 62619路径或欧盟《电池法规》相当。格林纳达的BESS项目依据IEC/英国传统标准和GRENLEC并网要求运作，PURC担任能源监管机构，GDBS担任标准机构。中国BESS出口格林纳达的实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为项目验收的国际预期基准——中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131和GB 38031不被接受为替代依据；（2）GRENLEC或项目业主规格中引用的IEC 62933系统级技术要求；（3）符合NFPA 855的消防安全安装设计，格林纳达遵循NFPA参考规范框架；（4）国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件，适用于经圣乔治港的海运；（5）230/400 V电网配置——注意虽然中国和格林纳达同为50 Hz，但电压不同（中国为220/380 V），储能变流器须重新配置参数；（6）加勒比海部署须符合飓风风荷载（2004年伊万飓风后的四至五级设计标准）及IEC 60068-2-52盐雾腐蚀降额要求。GDBS机构能力仍在建设中，PURC尚未公开发布详细的BESS专属技术并网标准——在项目设备最终确定前，直接与GRENLEC和PURC接触至关重要。
answer_first.zht: 格瑞那達尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與成熟的SABER/IEC 62619路徑或歐盟《電池法規》相當。格瑞那達的BESS項目依據IEC/英國傳統標準和GRENLEC併網要求運作，PURC擔任能源監管機構，GDBS擔任標準機構。中國BESS出口格瑞那達的實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為項目驗收的國際預期基準——中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131和GB 38031不被接受為替代依據；（2）GRENLEC或項目業主規格中引用的IEC 62933系統級技術要求；（3）符合NFPA 855的消防安全安裝設計，格瑞那達遵循NFPA參考規範框架；（4）國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件，適用於經聖喬治港的海運；（5）230/400 V電網配置——注意雖然中國和格瑞那達同為50 Hz，但電壓不同（中國為220/380 V），儲能變流器須重新配置參數；（6）加勒比海部署須符合颶風風荷載（2004年伊萬颶風後的四至五級設計標準）及IEC 60068-2-52鹽霧腐蝕降額要求。GDBS機構能力仍在建設中，PURC尚未公開發布詳細的BESS專屬技術併網標準——在項目設備最終確定前，直接與GRENLEC和PURC接觸至關重要。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
